# Document

This document has duplicate heading names to test the unique suffix behavior of the chunker.

## Usage

First usage section describes how to use the CLI tool. It includes examples and configuration options for getting started quickly.

## Usage

Second usage section describes how to use the API programmatically. It covers authentication, endpoints, and response formats for integration.

## Usage

Third usage section covers advanced usage patterns including batch processing, webhooks, and custom middleware configuration.
